column.name: template_json
column.value: {"title":"Key Fact Statement","logoUrl":"assets/images/crediblex-light-logo.png","headerRows":[["Date of Issue: ${dateOfIssue}","Issued by: ${issuedBy}"],["Issued to: ${borrowerName}","Loan ID : ${externalId}"]],"sections":[{"key":"facility","title":"1. Facility Overview & Core Terms","columns":["Sr. No.","Parameter / Feature","Details"],"rows":[["(i)","Approved Limit / Loan Amount","${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"],["(ii)","Product Type","Revenue-Based Financing"],["(iii)","Tenure","${tenure}"],["(iv)","Repayment Frequency","${repaymentFrequency}"],["(v)","Total Interest","${currencyCode} ${totalInterest}"],["(vi)","${interestRateBasisLabel}","${interestRateBasisValue}"],["(vii)","Total Repayable Amount","${currencyCode} ${totalRepayable} (Principal + Interest)"],["viii","Processing Fee exclusive VAT","${currencyCode} ${processingFee}"],["(ix)","VAT on Processing Fee","${currencyCode} ${vatOnProcessingFee}"],["(x)","Prepayment / Early Closure Fee","1% of the outstanding or AED 10,000 whichever is less"],["(xi)","Other Fees and Charges","${otherFees}"],["(xii)","Late Payment / Overdue Interest","2.5% per month applied directly to overdue installments from the due date until actual payment"]]},{"key":"disbursement","title":"2. Disbursement Details","columns":["Parameter","Details"],"rows":[["Loan ID","${externalId}"],["Approved Amount","${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"],["Disbursement Date","${disbursementDate}"],["Disbursed Amount","${currencyCode} ${disbursedAmount}"]]},{"key":"schedule","title":"3. Detailed Repayment & Amortization Schedule","columns":["#","Outstanding Principal (${currencyCode})","EMI Due Date","EMI Amount (${currencyCode})","Principal Due (${currencyCode})","Interest (${currencyCode})","Status"],"source":"repaymentSchedule","totalRow":["", "Total", "-", "${currencyCode} ${totalRepayable}", "${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}", "${currencyCode} ${totalInterest}", "-"]}]}

column.name: template_json
column.value: {"title":"Key Fact Statement","logoUrl":"assets/images/crediblex-light-logo.png","headerRows":[["Date of Issue: ${dateOfIssue}","Issued by: ${issuedBy}"],["Issued to: ${borrowerName}","Loan ID : ${externalId}"]],"sections":[{"key":"facility","title":"1. Facility Overview & Core Terms","columns":["Sr. No.","Parameter / Feature","Details"],"rows":[["(i)","Approved Limit / Loan Amount","${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"],["(ii)","Product Type","Invoice Discounting"],["(iii)","Tenure","${tenure}"],["(iv)","Repayment Frequency","${repaymentFrequency}"],["(v)","Total Interest","${currencyCode} ${totalInterest}"],["(vi)","Interest Rate","${interestRate}% per annum"],["(vii)","Total Repayable Amount","${currencyCode} ${totalRepayable} (Principal + Interest)"],["viii","Processing Fee exclusive VAT","${currencyCode} ${processingFee}"],["(ix)","VAT on Processing Fee","${currencyCode} ${vatOnProcessingFee}"],["(x)","Prepayment / Early Closure Fee","1% of the outstanding or AED 10,000 whichever is less"],["(xi)","Other Fees and Charges","${otherFees}"],["(xii)","Late Payment / Overdue Interest","2.5% per month applied directly to overdue installments from the due date until actual payment"]]},{"key":"disbursement","title":"2. Disbursement Details","columns":["Parameter","Details"],"rows":[["Loan ID","${externalId}"],["Approved Amount","${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"],["Disbursement Date","${disbursementDate}"],["Disbursed Amount","${currencyCode} ${disbursedAmount}"]]},{"key":"schedule","title":"3. Detailed Repayment & Amortization Schedule","columns":["#","Outstanding Principal (${currencyCode})","EMI Due Date","EMI Amount (${currencyCode})","Principal Due (${currencyCode})","Interest (${currencyCode})","Status"],"source":"repaymentSchedule","totalRow":["", "Total", "-", "${currencyCode} ${totalRepayable}", "${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}", "${currencyCode} ${totalInterest}", "-"]}]}

column.name: template_json
column.value: {"title":"Key Fact Statement","logoUrl":"assets/images/crediblex-light-logo.png","headerRows":[["Date of Issue: ${dateOfIssue}","Issued by: ${issuedBy}"],["Issued to: ${borrowerName}","Loan ID : ${externalId}"]],"sections":[{"key":"facility","title":"1. Facility Overview & Core Terms","columns":["Sr. No.","Parameter / Feature","Details"],"rows":[["(i)","Approved Limit / Loan Amount","${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"],["(ii)","Product Type","Payables Finance"],["(iii)","Tenure","${tenure}"],["(iv)","Repayment Frequency","${repaymentFrequency}"],["(v)","Total Interest","${currencyCode} ${totalInterest}"],["(vi)","Interest Rate","${interestRate}% per annum"],["(vii)","Total Repayable Amount","${currencyCode} ${totalRepayable} (Principal + Interest)"],["viii","Processing Fee exclusive VAT","${currencyCode} ${processingFee}"],["(ix)","VAT on Processing Fee","${currencyCode} ${vatOnProcessingFee}"],["(x)","Prepayment / Early Closure Fee","1% of the outstanding or AED 10,000 whichever is less"],["(xi)","Other Fees and Charges","${otherFees}"],["(xii)","Late Payment / Overdue Interest","2.5% per month applied directly to overdue installments from the due date until actual payment"]]},{"key":"disbursement","title":"2. Disbursement Details","columns":["Parameter","Details"],"rows":[["Loan ID","${externalId}"],["Approved Amount","${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"],["Disbursement Date","${disbursementDate}"],["Disbursed Amount","${currencyCode} ${disbursedAmount}"]]},{"key":"schedule","title":"3. Detailed Repayment & Amortization Schedule","columns":["#","Outstanding Principal (${currencyCode})","EMI Due Date","EMI Amount (${currencyCode})","Principal Due (${currencyCode})","Interest (${currencyCode})","Status"],"source":"repaymentSchedule","totalRow":["", "Total", "-", "${currencyCode} ${totalRepayable}", "${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}", "${currencyCode} ${totalInterest}", "-"]}]}

column.name: template_json
column.value: {"title":"Key Fact Statement","logoUrl":"assets/images/crediblex-light-logo.png","headerRows":[["Date of Issue: ${dateOfIssue}","Issued by: ${issuedBy}"],["Issued to: ${borrowerName}","Loan ID : ${externalId}"]],"sections":[{"key":"facility","title":"1. Facility Overview & Core Terms","columns":["Sr. No.","Parameter / Feature","Details"],"rows":[["(i)","Approved Limit / Loan Amount","${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"],["(ii)","Product Type","Factor Rate"],["(iii)","Tenure","${tenure}"],["(iv)","Repayment Frequency","${repaymentFrequency}"],["(v)","Total Repayable","${currencyCode} ${totalRepayable}"],["(vi)","Factor Rate","${factorRate}x"],["(vii)","Total Repayable Amount","${currencyCode} ${totalRepayable}"],["viii","Processing Fee exclusive VAT","${currencyCode} ${processingFee}"],["(ix)","VAT on Processing Fee","${currencyCode} ${vatOnProcessingFee}"],["(x)","Prepayment / Early Closure Fee","1% of the outstanding or AED 10,000 whichever is less"],["(xi)","Other Fees and Charges","${otherFees}"],["(xii)","Late Payment / Overdue Interest","2.5% per month applied directly to overdue installments from the due date until actual payment"]]},{"key":"disbursement","title":"2. Disbursement Details","columns":["Parameter","Details"],"rows":[["Loan ID","${externalId}"],["Approved Amount","${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"],["Disbursement Date","${disbursementDate}"],["Disbursed Amount","${currencyCode} ${disbursedAmount}"]]},{"key":"schedule","title":"3. Detailed Repayment & Amortization Schedule","columns":["#","Outstanding Principal (${currencyCode})","Instalment Due Date","Instalment Amount (${currencyCode})","Principal Due (${currencyCode})","Interest / Fee (${currencyCode})","Status"],"source":"repaymentSchedule","totalRow":["", "Total", "-", "${currencyCode} ${totalRepayable}", "${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}", "${currencyCode} ${totalInterest}", "-"]}]}
